qa_pairs.question: What are the commands for launching STAR-CCM+ versions from 15.04.010 to 17.06.008 in graphical mode, with either serial or parallel processing options, when accessing through OnDemand?
qa_pairs.answer: For STAR-CCM+ versions 15.04.010 through 17.06.008, you should first load `StdEnv/2020` and then either `starccm-mixed/17.06.008` or `starccm/17.06.008-R8`. To run in serial mode, use the command `starccm+`. To run in parallel on the local host with 2 cores, use the command `starccm+ -np 2`.

qa_pairs.question: What are the specific JupyterHub links for starting a desktop session on the FIR, NARVAL, and RORQUAL clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: To start a JupyterHub desktop session, use the following links: for FIR, `https://jupyterhub.fir.alliancecan.ca`; for NARVAL, `https://portail.narval.calculquebec.ca/`; and for RORQUAL, `https://jupyterhub.rorqual.alliancecan.ca`.
